name: Click in Place 3qt Clear Shallow Slim Plastic Storage Bin with White Latch for Home and Office Organization - Brightroom™
description:
Bring order to closets, study tables, and craft rooms with this 3 Quart Shallow Slim Bin from Brightroom™. Featuring a stackable design for compact spaces, this transparent shallow bin lets you easily see what you've stored inside. Designed in a slim shape, this storage box comes with two side integrated handles for easy carrying around, and it has a capacity of 3 quarts for ample storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
